results.title: ‘Bachao’: Gujarat man cheats death after lion pins him for 30 minutes; viral video captures ordeal
results.description: A cattle herder was seriously injured after a lion attacked him near his home in Gujarat’s Bhavnagar district. A viral video captured the terrifying incident as villagers surrounded the animal and tried to drive it away. The victim was rescued after a prolonged struggle and is receiving treatment, while locals have demanded stronger safety measures.

results.title: 'Sometimes we win, sometimes we lose': Cristiano Ronaldo confirms he won't play at another FIFA World Cup
results.description: A dramatic stoppage-time strike from Spain's Mikel Merino in the 91st minute ended Portugal’s FIFA World Cup 2026 campaign, leaving Cristiano Ronaldo in tears as he applauded and waved goodbye to fans in the stands.

results.title: Japan-linked oil tankers transit Strait of Hormuz carrying Saudi crude
results.description: Two more Japan-linked supertankers carrying Saudi crude have entered the Strait of Hormuz, bringing the total volume of crude exiting the Gulf this week to 16 million barrels

results.title: Matt Damon, Zendaya & Tom Holland Dazzle At Christopher Nolan's 'The Odyssey' Premiere I WATCH
results.description: Christopher Nolan's highly anticipated epic 'The Odyssey' made a grand debut at its London world premiere on Monday, with stars Matt Damon, Zendaya, Tom Holland, Anne Hathaway, Robert Pattinson, Charlize Theron, Lupita Nyong'o and more lighting up the red carpet. From Zendaya's striking Schiaparelli couture look to Anne Hathaway proudly showcasing her baby bump, the premiere was packed with standout fashion and star power. A giant Trojan Horse installation added to the spectacle ahead of the film's July 17 theatrical release. Watch this video for all the biggest red carpet moments, celebrity arrivals and highlights from one of the year's most talked-about movie premieres.

results.title: Department of Communication, UoH Scholars present at IAMCR 2026 in Galway, Ireland
results.description: Research scholars Deepika Ratan, Bala Krishna Kanukati, Treesa Reena John and Jumana Parvin from the Department of Communication, University of Hyderabad, presented their research papers at the International Association for Media and Communication Research (IAMCR 2026) hosted by University of Galway in Ireland from 28 June to 2 July 2026. results.title: World Zoonoses Day observed at Tuensang District Hospital
results.description: DIMAPUR: World Zoonoses Day, observed annually on July 6 to mark Louis Pasteur’s successful administration of the first rabies vaccine in 1885, was commemorated at District Hospital Tuensang under the theme “Working Together: Preventing Zoonoses through Community Action.”The programme, organised by NOHP PCZ, Sentinel Surveillance Site, was held at the School of Nursing and attended [...] The post World Zoonoses Day observed at Tuensang District Hospital first appeared on Nagaland Post .
results.source: Nagaland Post - Get The Latest Nagaland News, Brea

results.title: Wall Street, CEOs back Trump child savings plan
results.description: Some of America's biggest corporations and financial institutions lined up behind President Donald Trump's newly launched Trump Accounts programme, pledging financial support and describing it as an initiative that could broaden wealth creation for future generations.

results.title: KIDNEY FAILURE REASONS
results.description: ਗੁਰਦੇ ਸਾਡੇ ਸਰੀਰ ਦਾ ਇੱਕ ਮਹੱਤਵਪੂਰਨ ਅੰਗ ਹਨ। ਜੇਕਰ ਕਿਸੇ ਕਾਰਨ ਕਰਕੇ ਇਹ ਕੰਮ ਕਰਨਾ ਬੰਦ ਕਰ ਦਿੰਦੇ ਹਨ, ਤਾਂ ਜਾਨਲੇਵਾ ਹੋ ਸਕਦਾ ਹੈ।

results.title: Siya learnt from Sonam Raghuvanshi's mistakes: Police
results.description: There may be some obvious similarities, but the police have enough reasons to believe that Goyal learned from Sonam Raghuvanshi’s mistakes, coming up with an even stronger plan with more foolproof alibis, which were initially hard to break.
